_comment: NPC: Tan Lang (贪狼). Canon ID: N56. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Tan Lang

perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Tan Lang; Third Step+ wolf cultivator

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.
